## Summary
I have successfully updated all remaining `FakeCodespace()` calls across the codebase to include explicit arguments for all three required parameters: `run_exit_code`, `repo_id`, and `created_codespace_name`.
### Files Updated:
1. **`tests/unit/gateways/codespace/test_fake_codespace.py`** (15 calls updated) - Updated all no-argument `FakeCodespace()` calls to include all three parameters - Updated the one partial-argument call (`run_exit_code=42`) to include missing parameters
2. **`tests/unit/cli/commands/codespace/run/objective/test_plan_cmd.py`** (7 calls updated) - Replaced all `FakeCodespace()` no-argument calls with fully-specified multi-line calls
3. **`tests/unit/cli/commands/codespace/test_setup_cmd.py`** (9 calls updated) - Updated no-argument calls - Fixed partial-argument calls: - `FakeCodespace(created_codespace_name="gh-custom-abc")` → added `run_exit_code=0, repo_id=12345` - `FakeCodespace(repo_id=99999)` → added `run_exit_code=0, created_codespace_name="fake-gh-name"` - `FakeCodespace(repo_id=42)` → added `run_exit_code=0, created_codespace_name="fake-gh-name"` - `FakeCodespace(repo_id=12345, created_codespace_name="gh-mybox-abc")` → added `run_exit_code=0` - `FakeCodespace(created_codespace_name="gh-mybox-abc")` → added `run_exit_code=0, repo_id=12345` - Multi-line call with `run_exit_code=1, created_codespace_name="gh-mybox-abc"` → added missing `repo_id=12345`
4. **`tests/unit/cli/commands/codespace/test_connect_cmd.py`** (14 calls updated) - Replaced all `FakeCodespace()` no-argument calls with fully-specified multi-line calls
